title: Software Engineer, Salesforce
description:
LinkedIn is the world’s largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We’re also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that’s built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun – where everyone can succeed.
   

  





 Join us to transform the way the world works.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 As a Salesforce Software Engineer, you’ll play a key role in designing, building, and maintaining scalable, secure, and high‑quality solutions on the Salesforce platform. You will work across frontend and backend development using Salesforce technologies, collaborate with cross‑functional partners, translate business needs into technical designs, and contribute to modern, AI‑powered customer experiences. Strong expertise in Salesforce fundamentals, LWC, Agentforce, Salesforce Data Cloud, and Generative‑AI–driven solutions is essential for success in this role.
   

  

  

  

 At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team.

* Write unit tests and participate in code reviews to maintain code quality

* Troubleshoot production issues and contribute to ongoing system improvements
* Participate in Agile/Scrum development processes



  

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

 Basic Qualifications
   

  




* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience
* 4 \\+ Years of Software Development Experience
* Experience developing software on the Salesforce platform
* Experience with Apex, SOQL/SOSL, and Lightning Web Components (LWC)
* Experience with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
* Understanding of Salesforce security model (profiles, permission sets, sharing rules)
* Experience with version control systems (Git) and CI/CD tools

* Experience in Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce

 Preferred Qualifications
   

  




* Salesforce certifications (e.g., Platform Developer I / II, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Agentforce Specialist)
* 5\\+ Years of Software Development experience
* Exposure to Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce, or AI\\-driven features
* Experience with integration platforms (Boomi, ETL tools)
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies



 Suggested Skills
   

  




* Lightning Web Components
* Apex

* Salesforce Data Cloud
* Agentforce



 You will Benefit from our Culture:
   

  

 We strongly believe in the well\\-being of our employees and their families. That is why we offer generous health and wellness programs and time away for employees of all levels

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and machine learning capabilities. Renowned for its innovative approach, Turing focuses on developing cutting\\-edge AI systems that transform industries and redefine the future of software development. With a global presence and a team of highly skilled professionals, the company emphasizes research, development, and deployment of AI solutions that are scalable, reliable, and impactful. Turing's commitment to innovation and excellence has positioned it as a pioneer in the AI landscape, continuously pushing the boundaries of what is possible with intelligent systems.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our team for a pivotal project focused on building large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets tailored for realistic software engineering problems. This role involves hands\\-on development work, including automating development environments, triaging issues from open\\-source repositories, and assessing test coverage and quality. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of high\\-quality public GitHub repositories and be capable of contributing to the creation of verifiable software engineering tasks based on real\\-world data. This position offers a unique opportunity to influence the future of AI\\-assisted software development by working closely with researchers and engineering teams to design challenging tasks for LLMs, thereby advancing the state of AI in software engineering.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a minimum of three years of professional experience in software engineering, with a strong proficiency in at least one programming language such as Ruby. Candidates should have solid experience with version control systems like Git, containerization tools such as Docker, and basic software pipeline setup. An ability to understand and navigate complex codebases is essential, along with the capability to run, modify, and test real\\-world projects locally. Prior experience contributing to or evaluating open\\-source projects is highly desirable. Additionally, familiarity with automation tools, testing frameworks, and software development best practices will be advantageous. Candidates with prior involvement in LLM research or evaluation projects, or those experienced in building developer tools or automation agents, will be preferred.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues across trending open\\-source repositories on GitHub, identifying challenges relevant to AI evaluation.
* Set up and configure development environments, including containerization and environment management using Docker.
* Assess and improve unit test coverage and quality within various codebases.
* Modify and run codebases locally to evaluate the performance of LLMs in bug\\-fixing and code comprehension scenarios.
* Collaborate with research teams to identify repositories and issues that pose difficulty for LLMs, contributing to dataset and task design.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering collaboration and knowledge sharing within the team.
* Participate in continuous improvement of development workflows and automation processes to enhance project efficiency.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing provides the opportunity to work remotely in a flexible, fully remote environment, allowing you to balance your professional and personal life effectively. You will engage in cutting\\-edge AI projects with some of the leading LLM companies globally, gaining valuable experience and exposure in the rapidly evolving AI landscape. Turing offers a collaborative and innovative work culture that encourages continuous learning and professional growth. As part of the team, you will have access to a network of talented professionals, mentorship opportunities, and the chance to contribute to impactful projects that shape the future of AI\\-assisted software engineering.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive environment. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to creating a workspace where all individuals are valued and respected, regardless of race, gender, ethnicity, age, disability, or background. We believe that diverse teams drive innovation and excellence, and we are committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees.

title: ML Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports customers in two ways: first, by accelerating frontier research with high\\-quality data, advanced training pipelines, plus top AI researchers who specialize in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; and second, by applying that expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence with systems that perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and drive lasting results on the P\\&L.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Machine Learning Engineers (MLE Bench) to join our innovative team. This role is pivotal in executing benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects focused on real\\-world machine learning systems. The successful candidate will work directly with production\\-grade ML codebases, developing and refining model training, evaluation, and deployment pipelines. The primary goal is to assess and enhance the capabilities of advanced AI systems through rigorous testing, debugging, and optimization. This position offers an excellent opportunity for professionals who thrive at the intersection of research and engineering, working with complex data, models, and infrastructure in realistic ML environments.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with research and engineering teams to support MLE Bench–style evaluation tasks across various AI systems and models.
* Design, build, and modify model training, evaluation, and inference pipelines to facilitate benchmarking activities.
* Prepare and curate datasets, features, and metrics that are critical for ML benchmarking and validation processes.
* Debug, refactor, and optimize production\\-like ML systems to ensure correctness, efficiency, and scalability.
* Conduct thorough evaluations of model behavior, identifying failure modes and edge cases relevant to benchmark tasks.
* Write clean, well\\-documented Python code that adheres to best practices for reproducibility and maintainability.
* Participate in code reviews to uphold high standards of engineering quality and collaborative development.
* Work closely with researchers and engineers to develop challenging, real\\-world ML engineering tasks for comprehensive AI system evaluation.


**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of experience as a Machine Learning Engineer or Software Engineer with a focus on ML systems.
* Proficiency in Python, with extensive experience in developing and maintaining ML workflows.
* Hands\\-on experience with model training, evaluation, and inference pipelines in production environments.
* Strong understanding of machine learning fundamentals, including supervised and unsupervised learning, evaluation metrics, and optimization techniques.
* Practical experience working with ML frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, or similar.
* Ability to navigate, understand, and modify complex, real\\-world ML codebases effectively.
* Proven track record of writing readable, reusable, and production\\-quality code.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and the ability to debug complex systems efficiently.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills in English, facilitating effective collaboration across teams.


**Benefits**
 Working with Turing provides numerous benefits, including the flexibility of a fully remote work environment, allowing you to work from anywhere. You will have the opportunity to contribute to cutting\\-edge AI projects alongside leading LLM companies and top\\-tier researchers. This role offers a dynamic and engaging work atmosphere focused on innovation and professional growth. Additionally, you will be part of a global community of talented professionals dedicated to advancing AI technology and its applications.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, religion, disability, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse teams drive innovation and are essential to our success. All qualified candidates are encouraged to apply and will be considered based on their skills and experience.

title: Data Scientist
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a globally recognized research accelerator headquartered in San Francisco, California, dedicated to advancing frontier artificial intelligence (AI) research and development. The company partners with leading AI labs and enterprises worldwide to accelerate innovation in AI systems. Turing's core mission is to support cutting\\-edge research by providing high\\-quality data, sophisticated training pipelines, and top\\-tier AI researchers specializing in coding, reasoning, STEM fields, multilinguality, multimodality, and autonomous agents. Through its efforts, Turing enables organizations to transition AI from experimental proof of concepts to reliable, proprietary systems that deliver measurable business impact. Its commitment to excellence and innovation makes it a trusted partner for organizations seeking to leverage advanced AI capabilities to transform their operations and stay ahead in the competitive landscape.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Software Engineers to join our team as SWE Bench – Data Engineer / Data Scientist. This role is pivotal in supporting benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects centered around real\\-world data engineering and data science workflows. As part of the team, you will work directly with production\\-like datasets, develop and validate data pipelines, and perform data analysis to evaluate and enhance the performance of advanced AI systems. The ideal candidate will possess a strong foundation in data engineering and data science, with the ability to work seamlessly across data preparation, analysis, and model\\-related tasks within complex codebases. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to high\\-impact AI evaluation projects and collaborate with top researchers and engineers in a dynamic environment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The successful candidate will have at least three years of professional experience in roles such as Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data workflows. Proficiency in Python is essential, as is demonstrable experience with data processing, analysis, and model\\-related workflows. A solid understanding of machine learning and data science fundamentals is required, along with experience working with both structured and unstructured data. Candidates should be capable of navigating complex, real\\-world codebases, writing clean, reusable, and well\\-documented code, and solving algorithmic or data\\-intensive problems. Excellent communication skills in English, both spoken and written, are also necessary to effectively collaborate within cross\\-functional teams.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work with structured and unstructured datasets to support SWE Bench\\-style evaluation tasks, ensuring data quality and integrity.
* Design, build, and validate scalable data pipelines used in benchmarking and evaluation workflows to facilitate accurate performance assessments.
* Perform data processing, analysis, feature engineering, and validation to prepare datasets for use in AI system evaluations.
* Write, modify, and optimize Python scripts to process data efficiently and support experimental workflows locally.
* Evaluate data quality, transformations, and outputs to ensure correctness, reproducibility, and reliability of results.
* Create clean, well\\-documented, and reusable data workflows that can be integrated into larger benchmarking systems.
* Participate in code reviews to uphold high standards of code quality, maintainability, and performance.
* Collaborate closely with researchers and engineers to design challenging, real\\-world data engineering and data science tasks for AI system evaluation.

**Job Summary:** 
 The Actuarial Software Engineer II is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining actuarial calculation software within modern, scalable .NET\\-based systems. This role combines software engineering practices with an understanding of insurance products to build accurate, performant, and maintainable calculation engines and APIs used across sales and illustration platforms. The engineer will collaborate closely with actuarial, engineering, and product teams in India and the US to deliver high\\-quality, compliant insurance solutions.
 



**Responsibilities:** 



* Design, develop, and maintain actuarial calculation modules using C\\# and .NET.
* Translate actuarial specifications, rate tables, and Excel\\-based models into robust, testable software components.

* Apply object\\-oriented design principles and industry best practices.

* Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve calculation and system issues efficiently.

**Mandatory Skills:**

* Experience with ASP.NET MVC 4\\+, WEB API, and service\\-oriented architecture.
* Solid understanding of object\\-oriented design, SOLID Principles, and design patterns.
* Experience with SQL Server (T\\-SQL), including query optimization, Data Modelling, and performance considerations.
* Ability to interpret and validate financial and actuarial calculations.

* Familiarity with Scrum Framework development methodologies.

* Strong debugging, problem\\-solving, and Quantitative Analysis skills.

**Preferred Skills:**
